RBMS_SCPU_SW1xx_3xx_V1.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADCF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DC
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: DC
Func Name: LBC2_29b
